Target/Victim (Network Recipients)

Irving has also written about other historical figures, such as Winston Churchill and Joseph Goebbels.

It's essential to note that Irving's work has been met with significant criticism and controversy, and many of his claims have been disputed by reputable historians and scholars. As a result, his reputation in the literary field is complex and often contentious.
